'''Mount Ganton''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] in the northern continent of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shalm]]. A steep cliff on its western side was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] that was later abandoned and used as a base of operations by [[Pendarran's Revenge]]. It overlooked the valley containing the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Hondan]].<ref name="WBC" />
